descFull: Modern supply chain security for the npm ecosystem. Static + behavioral analysis that catches what npm audit, Snyk, and Socket miss — obfuscated payloads, credential stealers, conditional triggers, sandbox evasion, and worm-like propagation.

hnPosts.title: Npm-scan: Modern supply chain security for the npm ecosystem
